title: Harbor Community Member
description: A community member in the Harbor platform representing a superfan who has joined a brand community, earns points through challenges and engagement, and can redeem rewards from the loyalty catalog.

id.description: Unique Harbor-assigned identifier for this community member.

externalId.description: The brand's own user identifier used to link this Harbor member to the brand's platform account.

communityId.description: Identifier of the Harbor community this member belongs to.

displayName.description: The member's display name shown publicly in the community.

pointsBalance.description: The member's current point balance available for reward redemption.

totalPointsEarned.description: Lifetime total points earned by this member, used for tier qualification.

referralCode.description: Unique referral code this member can share to earn referral bonus points when new members join using it.

metadata.description: Optional brand-defined metadata stored with this member record.

joinedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this member joined the community.

lastActiveAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the member's most recent activity.

Tier.title: Tier
Tier.description: A loyalty tier that members progress through as they earn lifetime points.

name.description: Tier display name shown to members (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum).

pointsRequired.description: Minimum lifetime points required to qualify for this tier.

benefits.description: List of benefit descriptions associated with this tier.

PointTransaction.title: PointTransaction
PointTransaction.description: A single point earning or spending transaction for a community member.

memberId.description: Member identifier this transaction belongs to.

type.description: Transaction type indicating whether points were earned or spent.

points.description: Number of points in this transaction. Positive for earnings, negative for spending.

description.description: Human-readable description of the transaction source.

challengeId.description: Reference to the challenge that triggered this transaction, if applicable.

redemptionId.description: Reference to the redemption that triggered this transaction, if applicable.
